prompt: Using the provided reference image, make a minimal photorealistic edit: keep the bookstore setting, outfit, hairstyle, earrings, pose, book, lighting, camera angle, and overall composition unchanged, but change the subject’s head and gaze from a focused downward reading pose into a warmer, friendlier glance toward the camera. Preserve the natural candid smartphone-photo look and avoid changing the body, hands, shelves, background customers, or book placement. Desired mood: friendly and approachable.
